title: Yori3o's Grappling Hooks & Enderite CJ Edition
body:
Adds enderite grappling hooks to [**Yori3o's Grappling Hooks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yori3os-grappling-hooks) mod for compatibility with [**Enderite CJ Edition**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-cj-edition). Both mods are required.

You can add your own grappling hooks using this addon as an example, starting with version 4.0.0 of Yori3o's Grappling Hooks.
